title: Dead Channel Protocol
hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move.
location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes

villain.worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output.
villain.motive: Train the player to trust prediction over ethics.

arcs.title: Discovery & Curiosity
arcs.summary: Validate the first anomaly, establish trust baselines, and seed investigative obsession.

arcs.title: Escalation & Unease
arcs.summary: Push contradictions, introduce manipulative pressure, and degrade certainty.

arcs.title: Danger & Direct Involvement
arcs.summary: Force personal risk, urgent tradeoffs, and irreversible consequences.

arcs.title: Resolution or Psychological Break
arcs.summary: Collapse competing truths into final judgement, compromise, or breakdown.

beats.title: Day 01 - First Breach
beats.narrative: Day 01 - Discovery Window. A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. now converges with police report protocol signed payload in Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes, centered on the substation hum thread. Witnesses are fragile, chain-of-custody is thin, and rumors can outrun evidence in minutes. Your immediate job is to create a beginner-readable sequence: who observed what, when, and under which verifiable channel. Core mystery target: identify who is orchestrating the manipulation, how the evidence chain was altered, and what event this operation is trying to conceal. If this opening sequence breaks, later clues become noise and players lose confidence in what they are solving.

incomingMessages.text: Day 01 control: secure police report protocol signed payload, validate substation hum, and keep evidence readable for first-time investigators under pressure.
I can confirm movement around substation hum, but I need to know whether you trust this lead or think it is bait tied to police report protocol signed payload.
Public framing window is narrowing. If you want this to land as investigation instead of rumor, give one verifiable detail anchored to police report protocol signed payload.

responseOptions.summary: Protect people first while preserving admissible proof tied to police report protocol signed payload.

responseOptions.label: Force immediate audit on substation hum
responseOptions.summary: Push institutions hard and accept political resistance to expose tampering early.

responseOptions.label: Run shadow verification thread

Treat this beat as a credibility test: cross-check timelines, isolate verified artifacts, and decide whether to protect, bait, or interrogate. Core mystery target: identify who is orchestrating the manipulation, how the evidence chain was altered, and what event this operation is trying to conceal. Your choice determines whether the case remains understandable for new players or collapses into conflicting theories.

beats.title: Day 21 - Collapsed Witness

A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. now converges with marked map protocol signed payload in Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes, centered on the grid fault thread. A reckless move may gain short-term progress but can permanently corrupt trust, testimony, and final ending quality.

endings.title: Documented Justice
endings.summary: Evidence chain survives scrutiny and responsible parties are exposed.
endings.epilogue: The investigation closes publicly, but residual files imply a wider network.
endings.sequelHook: A new sealed case number appears in your inbox at 03:11.

endings.title: Pyrrhic Containment
endings.summary: The immediate threat is contained, but key truths remain buried.
endings.epilogue: Witnesses are safe for now, yet official records are permanently altered.
endings.sequelHook: Unknown Contact sends a checksum that references a second operation.

endings.title: Compromised Truth
endings.summary: Player choices preserve stability by accepting manipulated facts.
endings.epilogue: Case status becomes classified and public narrative diverges from internal logs.
endings.sequelHook: An antagonist fragment congratulates your efficiency.

endings.title: Psychological Break
endings.summary: Contradictions remain unresolved and trust collapses across all channels.
endings.epilogue: Your board is complete but no version of events can be proven cleanly.
endings.sequelHook: A mirrored transcript appears using your own phrasing.

playerBriefing.roleTitle: Lead Case Analyst - Dead Channel Protocol Taskforce

replayHooks: Prediction feed mutates by prior endings.
Fast-response players get shorter silence windows.
Hidden branch if all ultimatums are answered in time.
sequelHooks: A dormant protocol node pings from a transit authority in another state.
branchingMoments: Code audit vs field response opening
Disable network vs exploit protocol for leverage

caseFile.objective: Resolve Dead Channel Protocol with an evidence chain that survives legal scrutiny and protects live witnesses.
caseFile.primaryQuestion: Who is orchestrating the substation hum pressure cycle, and what truth are they paying to erase?
caseFile.operationWindow: 72-hour stabilization window, followed by a four-week escalation to final confrontation.
successCriteria: Maintain witness cooperation through escalating antagonist pressure.
Corroborate a full chronology from first breach to final confrontation.
Preserve admissible evidence across all channel and media drops.
Close with a coherent novice-understandable explanation of motive and method.
failureConsequences: Witnesses fragment or withdraw, collapsing testimony quality.
Narrative capture outruns forensic validation in public channels.
Evidence is recast as rumor due to broken custody chain.
The antagonist frame becomes accepted canon regardless of truth.
